title: Sione Mata'utia
description: Australia & Samoa international rugby league footballer
extract:
Sione Mata'utia-Leifi (pronounced ma-ta-oo-tee-a) (born 25 June 1996) is a former professional rugby league footballer who plays as a second-row forward and centre for Lakes United Seagulls in the Newcastle Rugby League. He has represented both Australia and Samoa at international level.
He previously played for the Newcastle Knights in the NRL, as well as the Prime Minister's XIII and World All Stars at representative level. Mata'utia played as a fullback, winger and centre earlier in his career, before moving into the forwards.
